name: How to Clean Artichokes-Roman Jewish Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Place cold water mixed with lemon juice and lemon rinds in a large bowl.
2. Keep artichokes in separate bowl of cold water while cleaning.
3. Take one artichoke, drain it, and remove the smallest outer leaves.
4. Hold artichoke bottom toward little finger; tilt top away from hand.
5. With right hand holding small sharp knife, insert tip into tender leaf part.
6. With left hand moving artichoke clockwise, cut upward in a spiral with right hand.
7. Discard tough leaf parts; edible tender portion remains.
8. Peel green layer from bottom and stem.
9. Place trimmed artichokes in lemon juice mixture until ready to cook.
10. To prevent floating, use an inverted plate or crowd into glass jar covered with water.
11. Refrigerate unused artichokes for no more than a few hours; discard after spoilage.
This recipe retains the original title, ingredients, and instructions while improving clarity and consistency.
